goal: Drive every non-complete conductor track to completed, explicitly blocked, or intentionally archived state.
global_rules: Do not revert unrelated dirty work.
Each worker edits only its owned files and track plan.
Every worker handoff must list files changed, tests run, residual blockers, and track checkboxes updated.
Quality_Validator must accept the handoff before Integration_Lead marks a track complete.
A track is not complete until implementation, focused tests, conductor plan updates, metadata updates, and validation notes are present.
If local dotnet validation is blocked by SDK/workload resolver state, record the exact blocker and route environment repair to Integration_Lead before marking implementation tracks complete.

completion_states.ready: Dependencies are satisfied and worker may implement.
completion_states.validating: Implementation is handed off to Quality_Validator.
completion_states.complete: Validator accepted and Integration_Lead reconciled track metadata.

waves.name: Baseline and Environment Repair
waves.exit_gate: Mission files, dirty-state note, stale mission handling, and dotnet validation blocker are recorded.

waves.name: Foundations
waves.exit_gate: Shared telemetry, connector validation, parser/CLI behavior, and legacy test tracks have accepted validation.

waves.name: AI and Connector Completion
waves.exit_gate: AI Builder and connector flows reuse telemetry and schema validation, with retry/polling/timeout tests accepted.

waves.name: Strategic Product Coverage
waves.exit_gate: Each product surface has fake-client tests and no live tenant dependency in unit tests.

waves.name: Dataverse and Forms Depth
waves.exit_gate: Each command slice has parser and executor coverage and preserves existing v1 behavior.

waves.name: Docs, Performance, and Legacy Closure
waves.exit_gate: Docs build or blocker is recorded, performance checks are opt-in, and legacy tracks are completed or archived with rationale.

waves.name: Copilot and Final Reconciliation
waves.exit_gate: Copilot starts only after MCP closure, then Integration_Lead reconciles conductor/tracks.md and status reports.

responsibilities: Maintain this manifest as queue state changes.
Move failed validation back to the owning worker.
Stop the mission only when every active track is complete, blocked, or archived.
Repair or document environment validation blockers.
Update final conductor reports after validator acceptance.
Run focused tests or record the exact blocker.
Approve, reject, or mark blocked with file/line evidence.

known_blockers.required_resolution: Fix SDK/workload resolver or record an accepted external validation path before final completion.
Complete, archive, or explicitly bypass MCP Server before Copilot implementation starts.

final_done_definition: active_track_queue is empty or every remaining item is marked blocked with accepted rationale.
conductor/tracks.md has no contradictory duplicate status for the same track.
Every track metadata.json status matches the accepted state.
logs/status_all.json or replacement status report is regenerated.
Quality_Validator has an acceptance note for every completed track.
Integration_Lead has summarized unresolved dirty work and validation gaps.
